creator: der_julian@web.de
text:
> Try this commands:
> rm /var/db/pkg/pkgdb.db; pkgdb -u
>
> And try again
> portinstall help2man
>
> I can't reproduce it, but looks like there is a possibility pkgdb.db was
> corrupted some way. Tell me if I wrong.

I cannot reproduce it either on a new box. Perhaps the pkgdb.db was
corrupted when the original box panic'ed due to other causes.

Regards
